description: Represents a parallelepiped (3D box) formed by the box product of three vectors. Can be constructed from three vectors, an origin with three points, or nine coordinates.
utility: Create a 3D parallelepiped (box) from three vectors.

arguments.name: vectors/points
arguments.type: three vector3d | origin + three point3d | nine numbers
arguments.description: Either: three vector3d expressions; one origin point3d + three point3d for endpoints; or nine coordinates

alternates.description: Three vector3d expressions sharing a common start point (the origin)
Origin point3d and three endpoint point3d; vectors are from origin to each point
Nine numeric coordinates representing three edge vectors from origin (0,0,0)

examples.scenario: Create box from origin and three points
examples.expression: G = g3d(at(4,23), view(20, 20)); O = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0); P1 = point3d(G, 1, 0, 0); P2 = point3d(G, 0, 1, 0); P3 = point3d(G, 0, 0, 1); B = boxprod(G, O, P1, P2, P3)
